subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Nabíl! Thy sorrow hath indeed grieved Me. We have made mention of thee in Our Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل نبیل قد احزنتی حزنک ذکرناک فی الواح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort
